==== /.src/multipleFlows.ts (3 flows) ====

=== Effect Flow ===
Kind: pipeline
Location: 5:14 - 8:2
Root: pipe(\n  Effect.succeed(1),\n  Effect.map((n) => n + 1)\n)
Path (4 nodes):
  [0] root {effect A=number E=never R=never} pipeline
      ==> [subject] -> [1]
  [1] pipeSubject {plain A=1} 1
      ~> [call] -> [2]
  [2] pipeTransformation {effect A=number E=never R=never} step 0: Effect.succeed
      ==> [pipe] -> [3]
  [3] pipeTransformation {effect A=number E=never R=never} step 1: Effect.map

      label: pipeline
      ordinal: 0
      result.kind: effect

      result.E: never
      result.R: never

      ordinal: 0

      result.R:

=== Effect Flow ===
Kind: pipeline
Location: 10:14 - 12:2
Root: Effect.succeed("hello").pipe(\n  Effect.map((s) => s.toUpperCase())\n)
Path (4 nodes):
  [0] root {effect A=string E=never R=never} pipeline
      ==> [subject] -> [1]
  [1] pipeSubject {plain A="hello"} "hello"
      ~> [call] -> [2]

=== Effect Flow ===
Kind: pipeline
Location: 15:24 - 18:2
Root: pipe(\n  Effect.all([flow1, flow2]),\n  Effect.map(([n, s]) => `${s}: ${n}`)\n)
Path (4 nodes):
  [0] root {effect A=string E=never R=never} pipeline
      ==> [subject] -> [1]
  [1] pipeSubject {plain A=[Effect<number, never, never>, Effect<string, never, never>]} [flow1, flow2]
      ~> [call] -> [2]
  [2] pipeTransformation {effect A=[number, string] E=never R=never} step 0: Effect.all
      ==> [pipe] -> [3]
  [3] pipeTransformation {effect A=string E=never R=never} step 1: Effect.map

      ordinal: 0
